purpose: Read-only display surface for BaoFu settlement account status facts on role status pages.
rationale: The status page needs a non-interactive progress summary, not form-like label/value rows. TDesign cell visually reads as a selectable form row in this flow and caused short labels such as 核验费 to wrap on narrow devices, so this component uses TDesign tag/icon primitives inside an icon-led read-only fact strip.
